user_outcome: Plex Live TV now uses the real Plex Live TV/DVR guide with curated JasonOS Mission 2 IPTV channels; clean Plex Web playback verified.
issue_reported: Playback Error: Could not tune channel. Please check your tuner or antenna.
root_cause: Threadfin was previously handing Plex raw upstream HLS/no-buffer output. Plex Live TV tuning requires a stable tuner-style transport stream handoff.
architecture_clarification: This is not a fake Live TV folder. Plex Live TV/DVR is being redirected through a virtual HDHomeRun-compatible Threadfin tuner at http://127.0.0.1:35400, so Plex keeps its native Live TV Guide/Watch Now experience while only curated channels are exposed.

direct_threadfin_probe.method: curl against each /stream/<id> endpoint with 12 second bounded capture

plex_web_playback_probe.method: Chrome extension controlled Plex Web test on real Live TV Guide
plex_web_playback_probe.player_src_type: Plex Web blob stream from local Plex server

threadfin_log_evidence: Streaming Status: Receive data from FFMPEG
publication_state: PAUSE_PUBLICATION unchanged; this Mission 2 IPTV fix did not start ScarFLIX publication or catalogue expansion.
user_instruction: Use Plex > Live TV > MediaCentre > Guide. If an old modal remains from before the fix, close it or reload the page and press Watch Now again.
residual_risk: Plex still labels the virtual adapter as a tuner; that is expected because this is how Plex Live TV accepts IPTV.
Threadfin currently advertises one tuner, so one simultaneous live channel is safest until tuner count/rescan is deliberately expanded.
If Plex caches a stale failed session, reload the Live TV page before retesting.
